title: Platner Suspends Senate Bid in Maine After Rape Accusation
summary: Mr. Platner’s withdrawal, which comes after a woman accused him of rape, creates deep uncertainty in a race that both parties see as crucial to their hopes of winning the Senate.

title: ‘A Slow-Rolling Disaster’: Inside the Implosion of the Platner Campaign
summary: Graham Platner’s bid for the Senate inspired progressive Democrats. But the campaign, which he suspended Wednesday, was messy, disorganized and ultimately doomed by a steady drip of scandal.

title: Graham Platner Suspended His Senate Campaign. Here’s What’s Next for Democrats.
summary: The deadline to pick a new nominee is July 27 and candidates are already lining up. State party leaders said they would hold some form of nominating convention.

title: Does a Sex Assault Claim Kill a Political Career? It Depends.
summary: The swift exit of Graham Platner from the Maine Senate race followed Eric Swalwell’s similar exit from the California governor’s race, but Republicans have taken a different tack.

title: Tanker Attacks Risk Overplaying Iran’s Hand, Analysts Say
summary: Iran’s history shows it is willing to dig in, even when it may suffer big losses.

title: Oil Prices Hold Gains After U.S. and Iran Trade Another Round of Strikes
summary: Choppy trading in stocks and bonds also reflected anxiety among investors about the war’s effects on inflation and growth.

title: How U.S. Satellite Imagery Restrictions Are Changing How We Report on Iran
summary: U.S. satellite image limitations have hampered journalists covering the Iran war. But other sources are offering workarounds, making it harder for militaries to conceal their actions.

title: Inspector of Buckling Building Cited for Missing Problems at Other Sites
summary: A New York Times review of city records shows that the firm, Domani Inspection Services, was repeatedly accused of breaking New York City rules.

title: Security Precaution Led Trump to Use Old Air Force One in Leaving Turkey
summary: The Secret Service is said to have asked that the president not use the Qatari-donated jet when he left Ankara. The swap deepens questions about the retrofitting of the new plane.

title: After Insulting Allies at NATO Summit, Trump Says They Love Him
summary: The meeting in Turkey featured President Trump at his most mercurial, veering from scorn to praise for European countries, including some whose patience with mollifying him has worn thin.

title: License to Make Patriot Missiles Could Help Ukraine Defend Against Russia
summary: With Patriot interceptors in short supply, President Trump’s statement that he would allow Ukraine to build them is a boon to Kyiv as it fights off Russian missile attacks. But it is just the start.

title: Which Country Has the Best-Dressed World Cup Fans?
summary: At World Cup matches featuring teams from five continents, our photographer captured fans, flags, fringe, face paint and at least one horned helmet.

title: Judge Orders $5 Million Trump Judgment Be Released to E. Jean Carroll
summary: Ms. Carroll had asked a federal judge to order the president to pay the judgment after a jury found he sexually abused and defamed her.

title: 2026 Emmy Nominations: ‘The Pitt’ and ‘Hacks’ Lead the Pack
summary: The HBO Max medical series earned 25 nominations in the drama category. And in comedy, the final season of “Hacks” set a record with 24 nominations.

title: Emmys Snubs and Surprises 2026: Jon Hamm, Ariana Madix and More
summary: Other unexpected results include nods for Chase Infiniti and the “Love Island USA” host Ariana Madix and a snub for “The Amazing Race.”

title: Vance, in Wisconsin, Highlights Twin Fights, Against Fraud and Democrats
summary: The vice president called Democrats “a party that is fighting for fraud,” even as he highlighted the case of a woman who was first indicted under the Biden administration.

title: As Progressives Rack Up Wins, Hakeem Jeffries Shrugs Off Possible Challenges
summary: In a wide-ranging interview with The New York Times, Hakeem Jeffries, the House Democratic leader, said he didn’t consider the recent wave of anti-establishment victories “an overall critique of the party.”

title: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear Demands Health Update on Mitch McConnell
summary: Senator Mitch McConnell has been hospitalized since June 14. Speculation about his health has spread in recent days.

title: Family of Man Fatally Shot by ICE Agent Calls for Independent Inquiry
summary: The man killed, Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, was mourned by his sons as a father, husband and business owner. Details of the encounter remain unclear.

title: Trump Says He’ll Ask Supreme Court to Rehear Citizenship Case, an Unlikely Event
summary: The last time the justices granted a rehearing request after a case decision was in 1965. The court has only once reversed itself after rehearing a case.

title: As More Remains Are Found in Rubble From Venezuela Earthquakes, Horror Becomes Routine
summary: Fearful that officials would tear down damaged buildings without accounting for any remaining bodies, Venezuelans are desperately digging for their relatives’ remains.

title: Conor McGregor Is Said to Have Continued Use of Banned Drugs After Injury Healed
summary: Conor McGregor, who will make his return to fighting this weekend, took human growth hormone and anabolic steroids after recovering from a broken leg, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: How to Be a Good Guest at a Dinner Party
summary: Tips for endearing yourself to your host and fellow attendees — and all but guaranteeing you’ll be asked back.

title: The Democrats Can’t Go On Like This
summary: The trouble in Maine goes beyond a single candidate.

title: The Zombification of America
summary: Much of the world feared abandonment by the United States. It’s actually a new beginning.

title: Late Night Joins the Hunt for Mitch McConnell
summary: “Apparently, people don’t like a majority senator disappearing with no explanation for three weeks,” Ronny Chieng said on Wednesday’s “Daily Show.”

title: Second Person in a Week Killed by Federal Task Force in Memphis
summary: Tennessee authorities are investigating both shootings involving agents working with the task force in Memphis.
